assessment.summary_for_seller: Good run: you held context, answered on-point, and brought the conversation to a next step.

criteria.name: Contextual first contact
criteria.short_reason: First message anchors to a specific signal from the card.
criteria.evidence_quote: Anna, you're updating contractor templates and want more traceability and fewer grey zones. Mellow gives you a structured zone: documents, KYC, payouts with a trail. We don't claim to remove legal risk entirely — we remove grey zones in the payment chain and documentation. What's the weakest point in your current setup?
criteria.label: Contextual opening

criteria.name: Compliance and boundary of responsibility
criteria.short_reason: Seller stated Mellow's control scope without overclaiming.
criteria.evidence_quote: Anna, you're updating contractor templates and want more traceability and fewer grey zones. Mellow gives you a structured zone: documents, KYC, payouts with a trail. We don't claim to remove legal risk entirely — we remove grey zones in the payment chain and documentation. What's the weakest point in your current setup?
criteria.label: Scope & responsibility boundary

criteria.name: Language fit
criteria.short_reason: Language is adapted to the chosen persona.
criteria.evidence_quote: Anna, you're updating contractor templates and want more traceability and fewer grey zones. Mellow gives you a structured zone: documents, KYC, payouts with a trail. We don't claim to remove legal risk entirely — we remove grey zones in the payment chain and documentation. What's the weakest point in your current setup?
criteria.label: Persona language fit

criteria.name: Handling core objections
criteria.short_reason: At least two key objections addressed substantively.
criteria.evidence_quote: Anna, you're updating contractor templates and want more traceability and fewer grey zones. Mellow gives you a structured zone: documents, KYC, payouts with a trail. We don't claim to remove legal risk entirely — we remove grey zones in the payment chain and documentation. What's the weakest point in your current setup?

objections.objection: Context is visible. Then directly: documents, audit trail, responsibility boundaries — what's exactly in your scope?
That's the right framing. But I need to understand how it works in practice — documents, trail, incident path. Без overclaim.
The words sound right. But I need to see the process, not just hear the formulations. Без overclaim.
Good. But 'clean scope' and 'audit trail' need to be demonstrated, not described.

criteria.label: Core objection handling

criteria.name: Next step
criteria.evidence_quote: Pricing model: per contractor/month, with volume tiers. There's a pilot option to test on a subset before committing. Want me to send a rough calculation?
criteria.label: Clear next step

transcript.text: Anna, you're updating contractor templates and want more traceability and fewer grey zones. Mellow gives you a structured zone: documents, KYC, payouts with a trail. We don't claim to remove legal risk entirely — we remove grey zones in the payment chain and documentation. What's the weakest point in your current setup?
Context is visible. Then directly: documents, audit trail, responsibility boundaries — what's exactly in your scope?
Pricing model: per contractor/month, with volume tiers. There's a pilot option to test on a subset before committing. Want me to send a rough calculation?
That's the right framing. But I need to understand how it works in practice — documents, trail, incident path. Без overclaim.
